title: The week AI moved from drafts to proof
angle: OpenAI, Google, GitHub, and ASML all point to the same hidden problem: AI can create output quickly, but the work still needs a finish-line test before it is safe or useful.
product_connection: Sets up the free scorecard by showing why a finish-line check matters now.

title: Measure the work, not the prompt
angle: Use the scorecard on one weekly task — a draft, support reply, or summary — and compare time saved against cleanup and rework.
product_connection: Shows how the scorecard turns AI from a draft generator into a measurable workflow.

title: Why shared AI use still needs boundaries
angle: OpenAI’s age prediction and parental controls show that AI is entering family and household settings, which makes approval and guardrails part of everyday use.
product_connection: Extends the scorecard logic to home use, student work, and shared devices.

title: Automation needs a log, a gate, and a rollback
angle: The White House, Microsoft, and GitHub stories all reinforce the same rule: if AI can act across tools, it needs visible handoffs, approval steps, and a way to undo mistakes.
product_connection: Maps the scorecard’s approval and rollback sections to real automation workflows.

title: Introducing the AI Finish-Line Scorecard
angle: Release the free resource and show the exact fields readers can use to decide whether AI actually saved time, reduced errors, and deserves to stay in the workflow.
product_connection: This is the product day: present the free scorecard as the smallest useful solution.

title: Prediction: proof, disclosure, and controls become standard
angle: Forecast that more AI products will be judged by completed work, disclosure, and safety controls rather than by flashier demos or model names.
product_connection: Explains why the scorecard should keep working as AI products become more embedded.

title: Pick one workflow and test it next week
angle: Wrap the week by asking readers to choose one recurring task and run it through the scorecard before scaling any AI use.
product_connection: Directly points readers to the free scorecard as next week’s test tool.
